description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a bald head, standing upright with arms slightly extended outward. The figure is minimally clothed, wearing only a pair of fitted shorts that cover the upper thighs and hips. The body is well-defined, with prominent musculature visible in the chest, arms, and legs, and the feet are bare. The skin surface appears smooth and matte, with no visible accessories or additional clothing. The overall build is athletic, and the figure is proportioned realistically for an adult human male. There are no visible objects carried or worn, and the posture is neutral and balanced.
description: A muscular adult male figure with a bald head, wearing fitted shorts and standing upright with arms extended. The body is well-defined and barefoot, with a smooth, matte skin surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, abdomen, and face, with arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, chest, and the curvature of the back and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad back, shoulders, and the back of the shorts, with arms and legs extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, chest, and leg muscles.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
